data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the auto-capture of weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind). While the linked use case mentions that weather was auto-logged as '68°F, clear', it does not provide evidence of the system's capability to capture precipitation and wind conditions, which are also part of the requirement. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the completeness of the weather data captured.
gaps: No evidence of precipitation and wind conditions being auto-captured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
